Math & Science · Cooking & Volume

Cups to Tablespoons Converter

Convert cups ↔ tablespoons with regional standards and mL output.

visual
0
Milliliters: –
Note: for dry ingredients, weight in grams is more reliable.
Standards at a glance
System1 cup (mL)1 tbsp (mL)
US customary236.58814.7868
US legal24014.7868
Metric25015
Imperial284.13117.7582

Use weight in grams for dry goods; volume is best for liquids.

Inputs & variables

  • System selection
  • Value
  • Direction (cups ↔ tbsp)

Theory

Factors depend on standard: e.g., US customary 1 cup = 236.588 mL and 1 tbsp = 14.7868 mL → 16 tbsp per cup.

Volume conversions are exact for liquids; for dry ingredients, weight (grams) is more reliable.

Examples

  • 1 US cup → 16 US tbsp → 236.59 mL.
  • 4 tbsp (metric) → 0.24 metric cup (≈ 60 mL).

FAQ

Which standard do you use?

Choose US customary/legal, metric, or imperial to get the right factor.

Dry vs liquid?

Use weight (grams) for dry goods; volume is best for liquids.
